🏮

Vietnam central coast drift

Example 7-day Hue → Đà Nẵng → Hội An

Rivers lanterns limestone mornings

Tester One · Tester Two

📅 2026-03-15 → 2026-03-21 · 7 days

Overview

Week-long coastal rhythm: imperial river city first, crest the pass descent into modern Đà Nẵng, then lantern nights in Hội An with a sandstone sanctuary morning before airport bounce.

  • Đông Ba market cash small notes still king for fruit stalls.
  • Grab bike helmets variable—pack buff bandana if squeamish about loaner hygiene.

Food

Meal cues often live inline on each itinerary day.
For cross-cutting reminders, reuse overview bullets:

  • Đông Ba market cash small notes still king for fruit stalls.
  • Grab bike helmets variable—pack buff bandana if squeamish about loaner hygiene.

Reference

vn-panel-hoian

## Lantern density tactics

- Ticket booth queues spike 17:45–18:30—carry small exact đồng.
- Cầu Pagoda midpoint irreversible bottleneck—upstream bridge lesser known still frames.
- Tripod polite low—or long exposure handheld IBIS trust.
